column1: ## RMS cell lines on DepMap, with FP/FN subtype classification.
## Source: Cellosaurus search for disease "Rhabdomyosarcoma" with DepMap xrefs,
## cross-checked against DepMap Public 26Q1 gene_effect.csv (verified each ACH-ID
## actually exists in the current release). Subtype assignments are from the
## published RMS cell-line literature (PAX3-FOXO1 / PAX7-FOXO1 fusion presence).
## subtype ∈ {FP, FN, UNK}  (UNK = subtype not confidently classified)
## fusion = the driver fusion (or "none" for FN lines)
## Used by bin/fetch_depmap.py to filter gene_effect.csv to RMS rows.
## bin/fetch_depmap.py validates each ACH-ID against the actual gene_effect.csv
## and silently drops any ID not present in the current DepMap release.
## To extend: add a row, then re-run bin/fetch_depmap.py to refresh the summary.

column6: alveolar RMS; aka SJCRH30; canonical FP-RMS reference
RMS line, fusion status not confidently classified in literature
